title: mentha longifolia var. mollissima
intro: Mentha longifolia var. mollissima, also known as Horsemint or Long-leaved Pennyroyal, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia var. mollissima include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to alleviate stress and anxiety. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
